title: Set --disable-compression to true as documented
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

The man pages for `--disable-compression` indicates that it is
true by default.  However the code has it set to false.  This changes
that.

Fixes: #1336

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat After talking to @nalind we should default to noncompression on buildah commit, and only compress on buildah push.
The man page was right as of #1274, so we broke the code somewhere.
OK, thanks @dwalsh and @nalind, I'll try to sort it out tomorrow.

OK, think it's set now with the latest push if the tests behave.  Commit and bud do NOT compress by default.  --disable-compression  is set to TRUE by default.

Push DOES compress by default.  --disable-compression is set to FALSE by default.

:pushpin: Commit fe01675 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan fe016752e13b556b2e597b918dfe3f1ededee567 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
